name: workforce-skills
description: AgentWorkforce skill packages and curated collections (published under @agent-relay). The autonomous-run cutover stack is grouped as the private autonomous-run-private collection.
author: khaliqgant

packages.name: autonomous-run-contract
packages.description: Use at the start of every autonomous, multi-PR, cutover-class delegated run. Authors the binding contract between operator and agent: gates, flip mechanism, rollback triggers, standing constraints, cross-repo authority, and explicit escalate-to-human conditions.

packages.name: auto-merge-and-composition-safety
packages.description: Use before auto-merging any PR in an autonomous run, and between consecutive merges that touch overlapping code. Covers live CI verification, substantive review, stale-vs-actionable bot triage, and cross-PR composition discipline.

packages.name: dormant-flip-and-rollback
packages.description: Use when designing or executing a cutover-class change. Encodes dark-launch, single-switch flip, refusal to flip on amber, and pre-authorized rollback procedure.

packages.name: swarm-blockers-and-gate-scoreboard
packages.description: Use during an autonomous run to dispatch supporting codex-impl plus claude-review agent pairs against hard blockers, and maintain the live RED/GREEN gate scoreboard.

packages.name: tiered-acceptance
packages.description: Use when a single gate would require deep proof across a large set. Splits acceptance into tier-1 deep proof and tier-2 smoke proof while preserving dormant-default, per-item enablement, and rollback.

packages.name: instrument-dont-guess
packages.description: Use when a fix has failed two consecutive times for the same symptom. Requires the third action to be a temporary diagnostic rather than another guess, and covers removing diagnostics after root cause.

collections.name: Autonomous Run Private
collections.description: Private autonomous-run operating stack for Agent Relay cutovers: contract authority, merge safety, dormant flips, diagnostics, blocker swarms, and tiered acceptance.

packages.reason: Binding authority contract for gates, merge/flip grants, rollback triggers, and escalation rules.
Per-PR live CI, review, bot-triage, and cross-PR composition safety before autonomous merges.
Dark-launch and single-switch flip discipline with a pre-authorized rollback path.
Support-agent dispatch and live RED/GREEN gate scoreboard for hard blockers.
Tier-1 deep proof and tier-2 smoke proof for broad acceptance gates.
Diagnostic-first discipline after repeated failed fixes for the same symptom.
